title: justicia totonaca
intro: Justicia totonaca, also known as Totonac justicia or false mormon tea, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. This shrub-like plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Justicia totonaca include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
